basic_details.job_title: CERC Senior Advisor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Central Electricity Regulatory Commission (CERC) Senior Advisor Notification 2026 has been released on 21 April 2026 on the official website cercind.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CERC Senior Advisor Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 62 years as on 01-01-2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Engineering, MBA/ PG Diploma in Financial Management or equivalent
qualification.details: Educational Qualification: (i) Degree in Engineering (ii) MBA/ PG Diploma in Financial Management or equivalent from a reputed institution/ University. Experience: (a) Post qualification working experience of not less than fifteen years in Power Sector/Regulatory body (b) Conversant with the regulatory framework in the power sector of India (c) Experience/knowledge of preparation of Reports/Orders pertaining transmission/generation projects. (d) Candidates having experience of working in Electricity Regulatory Commissions shall have added advantage. (e) Good communication and analytical skills, proficiency in MS Office Tools specially MS Word and MS Excel.

selection_process: Performance evaluation based on Technical Parameters (Academic background and relevant experience: 50%
Knowledge of working environment: 20%) Possibly written test to evaluate drafting and presentation skills
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CERC Senior Advisor Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 12-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CERC Senior Advisor position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 12th May 2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Advisor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Degree in Engineering and an MBA/PG Diploma in Financial Management or an equivalent qualification from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Senior Advisor role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Advisor position is 61 years as of 1st January 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Advisor position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 2,50,000/- per month, excluding GST.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the CERC Senior Advisor recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official email address specified in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Senior Advisor post?
faq.answer: The selection will be based on a performance evaluation considering academic background, relevant experience, drafting skills, and knowledge of the working environment. A written test might also be conducted.

faq.question: Q8. What kind of experience is required for this position?
faq.answer: A minimum of fifteen years of post-qualification working experience in the Power Sector or a Regulatory body is required. Experience in preparing reports/orders for power projects and familiarity with the Indian power sector regulatory framework are advantageous.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this Senior Advisor position?
faq.answer: The position of Senior Advisor is offered on a contract basis.
